title: SFI expanded offer for 2024: agreement holder’s information
body: " Information on this page is for SFI agreement holders for the SFI expanded offer for 2024. If you’re a SFI 2023 agreement holder, read the information on the SFI 2023 agreement holder’s page.   About your SFI agreement  Your agreement for the SFI expanded offer for 2024 comprises:   your agreement document, which you can view in the Rural Payments service  the SFI agreement terms and conditions: expanded offer for 2024 which set out the scheme rules that apply to all agreements – these rules are further explained in the relevant version of the SFI scheme information the relevant version of the SFI actions you’ve selected   Follow the relevant version of the SFI scheme information and actions for your agreement  The relevant version of the SFI scheme information and the SFI actions depends on the start date for your SFI agreement.  Agreements that started on or after 1 September 2024 which were applied for by 11 March 2025  You must follow these versions on the National Archives website:   version 1.2 of the SFI scheme information: expanded offer for 2024 version 1.1b of the SFI actions   Agreements that started on 1 August 2024  You must follow these versions on the National Archives website:   version 1.1 of the SFI scheme information: expanded offer for 2024 version 1.0 of the SFI actions   "
